A (baseline, contexto completo).text:
Limit: 350 requests
Window: 60 seconds (sliding, via Redis sorted-set ZADD/ZREMRANGEBYSCORE/ZCARD, 429 when ZCARD >= limit)
Breach status: HTTP 429 with Retry-After header
Config keys: RATE_LIMIT_RPM=350, RATE_WINDOW_S=60
